'''Ialtra''' was a [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] village on [[Lucazec/Legends|Lucazec]]. [[Akanah Norand Goss Pell]] grew up there. The neighboring villages' inhabitants destroyed Ialtra in fear of the Fallanassi and their powers.

{{City-stub}}
